creator: sv@ulstu.ru
text: I have the same issue on my HP 255 G3 (AMD E1-6010 APU with AMD Radeon R2 Graphics). Now I'm using FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE-p5. I have been forced to use the VESA driver since the drm-fbsd13-kmod port was removed, because when I kldload /boot/modules/amdgpu.ko, display goes blank immediately.
